requirement.title: LLM Suggestion Review Interface
requirement.goal: Cho phep user generate, preview, approve, reject, hoac modify tung LLM-suggested test case truoc khi materialize thanh `TestCase` thuc te trong test suite.
rationale: FE-06 da co pipeline tao `LlmSuggestedScenario` qua `ILlmScenarioSuggester`, nhung hien tai suggestions bi materialize truc tiep vao `TestCase` ma khong co human review gate.

`ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration` da so huu test suite lifecycle, change log, suite versioning, ownership checks, va approval-style workflows, nen review state cho suggested test cases nen nam tai day.

`LlmSuggestionCache` trong `ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant` chi la raw cache theo endpoint + ttl, khong phu hop lam durable review state vi khong co per-suggestion review status, reviewedBy, modified payload, hay applied test-case link.
Codebase hien tai da co request/expectation builders va pattern materialize test case tu LLM data, nen FE-15 co the them mot review-first workflow ma khong can tao module moi.

inScope: Them API de generate mot pending suggestion set cho test suite tu pipeline LLM cua FE-06.
Them API de list suggestions theo suite voi filter theo `ReviewStatus`, `TestType`, va `EndpointId`.
Them API de get detail mot suggestion de frontend preview full request/expectation/variables.
Them API de review tung suggestion voi 3 action: Approve, Reject, Modify.
Approve hoac Modify phai materialize suggestion thanh `TestCase`, `TestCaseRequest`, `TestCaseExpectation`, `TestCaseVariable`, va cap nhat `TestCaseChangeLog` + `TestSuiteVersion`.
Reject chi cap nhat review state, khong tao `TestCase` moi.
Them entity durable moi trong `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration` de luu tung suggestion voi review state, modified payload, va `AppliedTestCaseId`.
Reuse `ILlmScenarioSuggester` cua FE-06 de generate raw suggestions va reuse `ILlmAssistantGatewayService` de huong loi tu cache/audit hien co.
Refactor phan map `LlmSuggestedScenario` -> `TestCase` thanh service/factory tai su dung duoc boi ca FE-06 va FE-15.
Them unit tests cho generation command, list/detail queries, review command, va materializer/factory.
outOfScope: Bulk approve/reject va filter-based bulk operations (FE-17).
User feedback rating/helpfulness va feedback persistence (FE-16).
Thay doi bat buoc luong FE-06 hien tai de moi client deu phai qua review gate. FE-15 v1 la additive workflow.
Review cho rule-based path/body mutations; FE-15 v1 chi nham vao LLM-suggested cases.
UI implementation; package nay chi dinh nghia backend contracts va implementation direction.
Failure explanation workflow (FE-09) va reporting/export workflow (FE-10).

requiredFeatures.reason: Can approved API order de giam suggestion drift va giu endpoint scope deterministic.
Can `ILlmScenarioSuggester`, LLM cache, audit logging, va normalized `LlmSuggestedScenario` payload.
Can `TestCase`, request/expectation builders, va persistence patterns cho generated test cases.
Can suite scope, selected endpoints, business context, va ownership data.
Can subscription usage checks cho LLM preview generation va approved test-case materialization.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration
requiredModules.role: Primary module cho suggestion review state, approval workflow, va test-case materialization.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant
requiredModules.role: Support module cho raw suggestion cache (`LlmSuggestionCache`) va interaction audit (`LlmInteraction`).

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.ApiDocumentation
requiredModules.role: Indirect dependency thong qua FE-06 suggestion pipeline.

database.reason: Review workflow can durable per-suggestion state, modified payload, review metadata, va applied test-case links; `LlmSuggestionCache` khong dap ung requirement nay.

architectureDecisions.executionMode: Synchronous request-response with transactional materialization when a suggestion is approved or modified.

reviewStorage.groupingStrategy: Dung `CacheKey`/generation fingerprint de nhan dien mot suggestion set duoc tao tu cung request context.
reviewStorage.historyRule: Suggestion set pending cu cung suite bi mark `Superseded` truoc khi tao set moi; khong xoa lich su.

designPrinciples: FE-15 khong duoc luu review state trong `LlmSuggestionCache`; cache do la raw, ephemerial, va endpoint-scoped.
Materialized test cases van do `TestGeneration` so huu 100%; `LlmAssistant` khong duoc ghi truc tiep vao `TestCase` tables.
Approve/Modify phai transaction de tao test case + request/expectation/variables + change log + suite version + suggestion review state trong cung mot lan save.
Reject khong duoc tao side effect len `TestCase` hay suite version.
Mapping `LlmSuggestedScenario` -> `TestCase` phai duoc trich ra service/factory tai su dung boi ca FE-06 va FE-15, tranh duplicate logic.
FE-15 v1 phai additive, khong duoc vo tinh pha backward compatibility cua endpoint `generate-boundary-negative` da co.

notes: Generate preview reuse permission cua FE-06 de tranh mo them RBAC surface trong v1.

gracefulDegradation: Neu `ILlmScenarioSuggester` tra cache hit, FE-15 van tao durable suggestions moi tu cached payload ma khong goi live LLM.
Neu generate request khong tao ra suggestion nao, API tra ket qua hop le voi `TotalSuggestions = 0` va khong insert suggestion rows rac.
Neu approve fail sau khi da create `TestCase` nhung truoc khi commit, transaction phai rollback toan bo.
Neu suggestion da duoc approve truoc do va `AppliedTestCaseId` da co, review command nen idempotent thay vi tao duplicate test case.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: POST `/api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/generate` tao durable pending suggestions cho suite dua tren FE-06 suggestion pipeline.
AC-02: Generate preview chi hop le khi suite ton tai, user la owner, suite khong archived, va FE-05A gate co approved order.
AC-03: GET `/api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions` tra danh sach suggestions theo suite va support filter theo `reviewStatus`, `testType`, `endpointId`.
AC-04: GET `/api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}` tra day du payload preview cua mot suggestion.
AC-05: PUT `/api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}/review` voi `action=Approve` tao chinh xac 1 `TestCase` moi va cap nhat suggestion thanh `Approved`.
AC-06: PUT cung endpoint voi `action=Modify` materialize noi dung da modify, cap nhat suggestion thanh `ModifiedAndApproved`, va luu `ModifiedContent`.
AC-07: PUT cung endpoint voi `action=Reject` khong tao `TestCase` moi, chi cap nhat `ReviewStatus=Rejected`, `ReviewedById`, `ReviewedAt`, `ReviewNotes`.
AC-08: Approve/Modify phai luu `AppliedTestCaseId` de truy vet suggestion -> test case.
AC-09: Suggestion rows pending cu cung suite bi mark `Superseded` khi generate mot set moi.
AC-10: FE-06 `generate-boundary-negative` van giu behavior hien tai sau khi FE-15 duoc them.
AC-11: Materialized `TestCase` tu FE-15 duoc ghi `TestCaseChangeLog` va `TestSuiteVersion` theo cung audit pattern dang dung.
AC-12: Approve/Modify phai check `MaxTestCasesPerSuite`; generate preview phai check `MaxLlmCallsPerMonth` theo pattern FE-06.
AC-13: Model change cua FE-15 co migration moi trong `ClassifiedAds.Migrator`, build migrator pass, va `--verify-migrations` pass.
implementationOrder: 1. Tao entity + DbConfiguration + migration cho `LlmSuggestion` trong TestGeneration.
2. Trich logic map `LlmSuggestedScenario` -> `TestCase` thanh service/factory tai su dung duoc.
3. Implement command generate preview va persistence cho pending suggestions.
4. Implement list/detail query surface va models.
5. Implement review command cho Approve/Reject/Modify voi transaction.
